title: Homework 6 NPV and Valuation
description:
You calculate the Terminal Value of a company to be $35000 in ten years.

Your interest rate (required return) is 12%.

What is the Present Value of the Terminal Value?

Round your answer to the nearest whole dollar. Do not use $ signs or commas in your answer.
descriptionText:

Your interest rate (required return) is 12%.
What is the Present Value of the Terminal Value?
Round your answer to the nearest whole dollar. Do not use $ signs or commas in your answer.
